wiki.keyPeople: Rudi P. Fronk, (Chairman and CEO, 1999-current); Christopher J. Reynolds, (Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer)
wiki.extract: Seabridge Gold is a Canadian company that is pursuing the development of the Kerr Sulphurets Mitchell ("KSM") gold-silver-molybdenum-copper mine in northwest British Columbia. Headquartered in Toronto, the company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange. The company was founded in 1979 as a mining company but, in 1999, re-organized to pursue exploration and development of gold deposits with a new board of directors and new management team.
